themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles focusing on AI agents that can autonomously perform research tasks, collaborate, and interact with tools.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content related to AI tools that assist developers in writing, debugging, and understanding code.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Articles highlighting specific AI-powered tools designed to aid in various aspects of research.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Focuses on AI applications that condense large amounts of text or data into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI research platform
themes.description: Covers platforms and frameworks that enable the development, deployment, and management of AI research initiatives.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Explores AI's role in analyzing and understanding user sentiment from feedback and reviews.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Articles discussing the research, capabilities, and implications of AI-powered chatbots.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Examines how AI is being used to automate or enhance usability testing processes.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Investigates the effects of AI on jobs, skills, and the overall workforce.

themes.name: Synthetic users
themes.description: Content related to the creation and detection of AI-generated or synthetic personas and interactions.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
